name: CFRA Default Workflow
description: Complete CFRA workflow from input validation through completion

phases.name: Input Validation
phases.description: Validate EARS input files and requirements - no output files needed

outputContract.description: Input validation only - validates ears-outputs/ directory structure and content

phases.name: API & Comparative Research
phases.description: Research APIs, competitive analysis, and technical patterns

phases.name: User Story Generation
phases.description: Complete user story generation: component analysis → manifest-driven subcomponent stories → gap filling → final summary

finalPhases.name: Gap Analysis & Coverage Enhancement
finalPhases.description: Proactively identify coverage gaps and generate additional stories to fill them

finalPhases.name: Coverage Validation Gate
finalPhases.description: GATE ONLY: Validate SOW coverage ≥90% and User Flow coverage ≥95% - blocks progression if not met

finalPhases.name: Final User Stories Summary
finalPhases.description: Generate index.md and prd-summary.md summary documents

phases.name: Data Schema Specifications
phases.description: Generate database schema with entities, relationships, and constraints

phases.name: Data In Transit Specifications
phases.description: Generate API contracts, event streams, and integration message formats

phases.name: Integration Functions Specifications
phases.description: Generate external system integration functions and workflows

phases.name: UX Specifications
phases.description: Generate UI component specifications and user experience workflows

phases.name: Application States Specifications
phases.description: Generate state machines and workflow management specifications

phases.name: Core Functions Specifications
phases.description: Generate business logic and algorithmic function specifications

phases.name: Analytics Specifications
phases.description: Generate analytics, reporting, and business intelligence specifications

phases.name: Security Specifications
phases.description: Generate security architecture and compliance specifications

phases.name: Specification Reconciliation & Gap Analysis
phases.description: Reconcile all domain specs, resolve conflicts, and fill gaps for complete coverage

phases.name: Implementation Strategy & Planning
phases.description: Create technology-agnostic implementation roadmap with epics and tasks
